2-Year Samsung Care+ Device Protection| Buds Tier 1
from Amazon.com Services LLC
1.0 4
  • Unlimited Repairs: Breathe easy. You’re covered with unlimited repairs for drops, spills, and mechanical breakdowns.
  • Convenient Mail- in Replacement: With convenient mail-in repair or replacement service, you’re back up and running in no time.
  • 24/7 Expert Support: Get immediate answers from a Samsung Care+ expert 24/7 via phone or online for device setup, content transfers, and connecting with other devices.
  • Samsung Genuine Parts and Certified Technicians: Rest assured your device will be repaired by a Samsung Certified Technician using Samsung Genuine Parts.

Learn more
2-Year Headphones Protection Plan
from Asurion, LLC
4.1 53
  • NO ADDITIONAL COST: You pay no fees for repairs, replacements or reimbursements. Shipping included.
  • IMMEDIATE PROTECTION: Drops, spills, and cracked screens covered plus power surge protection from day one. Malfunctions covered after the manufacturer’s warranty ends.
  • EASY CLAIMS: File a claim in minutes at Asurion.com/amazon. We'll repair, replace, or reimburse you up to the purchase price (excluding tax).
  • ELIGIBILITY: Plan must be purchased with your product or within 30 days of purchase. Pre-existing conditions are not covered. (Products for business or commercial use are excluded)
  • TERMS AND DETAILS: Terms & Conditions are emailed within 24 hours and available in Your Orders on Amazon. More information about this protection plan is available within the “Product guides and documents” section. Simply click “User Guide” for more info.

from Asurion, LLC
4.1 8032
  • BEST VALUE: Protect all your eligible Amazon purchases including: tech, tools, appliances, furniture and more. All for one low monthly price.
  • PAST AND FUTURE PROTECTION: Covers malfunctions and failures, plus drops or spills for eligible portable items. Protection begins immediately for eligible purchases from the past 90 days, plus all eligible future purchases (products used commercially are excluded).
  • TRUSTED CYBERSECURITY: Digital security with scam detection for emails and texts.
  • EASY CLAIMS: File in minutes at www.asurion.com/amazon for fast repair or reimbursement - up to the purchase price.
  • NO HIDDEN FEES. CANCEL ANYTIME: Up to $5,000 in total claims per 12-month period. Your plan renews monthly until canceled (coupons applied at checkout don’t renew monthly).

Product Protection by Amazon.com Services LLC

  • Unlimited Repairs: Breathe easy. You’re covered with unlimited repairs for drops, spills, and mechanical breakdowns.
  • Convenient Mail- in Replacement: With convenient mail-in repair or replacement service, you’re back up and running in no time.
  • 24/7 Expert Support: Get immediate answers from a Samsung Care+ expert 24/7 via phone or online for device setup, content transfers, and connecting with other devices.
  • Samsung Genuine Parts and Certified Technicians: Rest assured your device will be repaired by a Samsung Certified Technician using Samsung Genuine Parts.

Product Protection by Asurion, LLC

  • NO ADDITIONAL COST: You pay no fees for repairs, replacements or reimbursements. Shipping included.
  • IMMEDIATE PROTECTION: Drops, spills, and cracked screens covered plus power surge protection from day one. Malfunctions covered after the manufacturer’s warranty ends.
  • EASY CLAIMS: File a claim in minutes at Asurion.com/amazon. We'll repair, replace, or reimburse you up to the purchase price (excluding tax).
  • ELIGIBILITY: Plan must be purchased with your product or within 30 days of purchase. Pre-existing conditions are not covered. (Products for business or commercial use are excluded)
  • TERMS AND DETAILS: Terms & Conditions are emailed within 24 hours and available in Your Orders on Amazon. More information about this protection plan is available within the “Product guides and documents” section. Simply click “User Guide” for more info.

Product Protection by Asurion, LLC

  • BEST VALUE: Protect all your eligible Amazon purchases including: tech, tools, appliances, furniture and more. All for one low monthly price.
  • PAST AND FUTURE PROTECTION: Covers malfunctions and failures, plus drops or spills for eligible portable items. Protection begins immediately for eligible purchases from the past 90 days, plus all eligible future purchases (products used commercially are excluded).
  • TRUSTED CYBERSECURITY: Digital security with scam detection for emails and texts.
  • EASY CLAIMS: File in minutes at www.asurion.com/amazon for fast repair or reimbursement - up to the purchase price.
  • NO HIDDEN FEES. CANCEL ANYTIME: Up to $5,000 in total claims per 12-month period. Your plan renews monthly until canceled (coupons applied at checkout don’t renew monthly).

      Brand Samsung
      Color White

      Form Factor True Wireless
      Impedance 32 Ohms

      About this item

      • REDESIGNED WITH THE BEST SOUND IN MIND: Keep your Galaxy Buds3 Pro in with a design that delivers long-lasting comfort for an immersive listening experience
      • A SLEEK DESIGN MADE TO SHINE: Let your sound shine as much as you do with Buds3 Pro that light up¹
      • AUDIO THAT ADAPTS TO YOUR SURROUNDINGS: Immerse yourself while staying alert to your surroundings thanks to Adaptive Active Noise Cancellation with Galaxy AI²; Your Buds will automatically adapt to help you hear what matters²
      • AUDIO TAILORED TO BEST FIT YOU: Immerse yourself in the best listening experience, no matter how you wear your Galaxy Buds3 Pro; An Adaptive Equalizer for Sound Optimization with Galaxy AI allows you to get the most out of your audio²
      • EXCLUSIVE 2-YEAR WARRANTY: Includes a 2-year limited Samsung warranty (Amazon exclusive)⁵
      • SOUND THAT TRANSPORTS YOU: Your favorite content deserves our best and most immersive audio¹
      • THEY SAY “HOLA,” YOU HEAR “HELLO: Hear translations through your Galaxy Buds during face-to-face conversations using Real-Time Interpreter with Galaxy AI³
      • YOUR BEST BUDS FOR TRANSLATING CALLS: Hear translations through your Galaxy Buds while using the Samsung Phone app³
      • TOUCH CONTROLS WITH A PERSONAL TOUCH: Program your Galaxy Buds controls to do what you want — pause, skip, accept calls and more — with Intuitive Touch Control¹
      • DESIGNED FOR DURABILITY: Listen to your Galaxy Buds3 Pro with peace of mind wherever the day takes you thanks to a durable design⁴
      Show more
      › See more product details

      Customer ReviewSamsung Galaxy Buds 3 FE Wireless Noise Canceling BudsSee Full Review

      Product Description

      Meet the new shape of sound — Galaxy Buds3 Pro — now completely redesigned with improved hardware to bring you deeper into the audio than ever before. With Galaxy AI¹, your Buds create the best listening experience by optimizing sound based on your surroundings and how you wear them — while providing a snug fit for all-day comfort, no matter what you do. Buds3 Pro get how much you love your audio. From jamming while cooking to listening to your favorite show on a crowded subway to taking a work call, your Buds will adjust to the different sounds around you using Adaptive Active Noise Cancellation so you always hear what’s important. Plus, they’re packed with features to create a convenient listening experience — from auto-switching⁴ your audio between your Galaxy phone and your Galaxy PC to immersing you in the latest TV shows with 360 Audio, now available on Samsung TVs. And it doesn’t stop there — Buds make perfect companions for your Galaxy phone as you travel. Real-Time Interpreter with Galaxy AI³ allows you to speak like a local as your phone translates speech right in your Buds so you never miss a word from your local tour guide. No matter what you listen to or how you listen, we’ve redesigned our Buds to give you the most immersive audio experience with Galaxy Buds3 Pro. ¹Requires a compatible Galaxy phone and One UI 4.0 or later with 1.5GB RAM or above. ²Requires initial set up via Samsung Wear app on compatible device. ³Requires compatible Galaxy device. Samsung account login and language preset (English and Spanish pre-installed; other languages require free download). Results may vary. ⁴IP-rated for submersion in up to 3 feet of fresh water for up to 30 minutes (charging case is not water-resistant). If the earbuds or your hands are wet, they must be dried thoroughly prior to handling. ⁵Available only on products sold by and shipped from Amazon.

      How customer reviews and ratings work

      Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

      Customers say

      Customers find these earbuds to be solid with good sound quality and superb noise cancellation. The fit receives mixed feedback - while some say they fit snugly, others report they fall out of their ears. The battery life, connectivity, and reliability also get mixed reviews, with some praising the impressive battery life and seamless connectivity, while others report issues with charging and connection problems. Value for money opinions are divided between those who find them worth the price and those who consider them overpriced.

      "These have got to be one of the worst earbuds that I have ever owned, they sound great but that doesn't matter when almost every time I put them on..." Read more

      "...The noise canceling is by far the best of all the Samsung Buds. The battery life could be better but the case holds several charges...." Read more
      "...the earbud are the best in the industry, in my opinion, and the noise cancelling and ambient sound modes are both vastly improved over the Galaxy..." Read more
      "...There is constant static along with muted audio. It sounds like someone playing a comb kazoo in my right ear. Not great...." Read more
      "...You can also have that! Noise cancellation and ambient modes, all of it easy to access together. And the volume on it is LOUD ...." Read more

      "...3 Buds provide an exceptional auditory experience, featuring a comfortable fit and remarkable noise cancellation, creating an immersive, personal..." Read more
      "Terrible fit, continuously popping out of my ears even when I'm sitting still. I even switched the tip size, minimal effect." Read more
      "...They are reliably the same from pair to pair and fit well. Azla makes great silicone eartips that passively block sound better than the stock ones...." Read more
      471 customers mention battery life, 168 positive, 303 negative471 customers mention "Battery life"168 positive303 negative
      Customers have mixed experiences with the battery life of these earbuds, with some finding it impressive and appreciating the wireless charging feature, while others report that they stop charging after 5 months or don't charge at all.
      "...It's not made for bigger fingers.... the third disappointment is the battery life guess I was expecting more than four hours out of a new set of..." Read more
      "These are my favorite earbuds! Perfect fit! They charge fast and keep a charge. Had no issues connecting to my phone! And the quality is prefect...." Read more
      "What can I say it's a Samsung!! Only thing I don't like is the wireless charging. Takes a bit to fully charge. Other than that I love it!!" Read more
      "...No different size ear pieces included. Also, the battery life is terrible compared to Buds 1. Other than that, they sound good." Read more
      292 customers mention reliability, 148 positive, 144 negative292 customers mention "Reliability"148 positive144 negative
      Customers have mixed experiences with the earbuds' reliability, with some reporting excellent performance and effective noise cancellation, while others mention that the left earbud stops working and the microphone fails after about three months of use.
      "Earbuds are fine and work great. But the charging case stopped working correctly a few days in, and now a few months out is completely defective...." Read more
      "I purchased these earbuds and 1 day they stopped working. I called Samsung and they directed me to a local service center...." Read more
      "Works great and I put these a little above my air pods pros 2. Great with my s24 ultra. Great equalizer and sound is crisp amd great on the bass side." Read more
      "...product in March 2025 and now it's June 2025 and one of the ear buds stopped working...." Read more

      "Not worth the money I paid for them... they were fine until I had to go and charge them, come to find out there was a defect in the entire product..." Read more

      Amazon Customer
      5 out of 5 stars
      BEST Buds!
      heard about these amazing ear buds and felt they would make a great gift for my guy -- ended up getting myself a pair too! then I got awesome cases (his in blue, and mine in red) -- they are easy to charge, both wired and wireless charging works without needing to take off the case... we are both very pleased with the purchases! the grip is great, the case opens easily and closes securely -- buds fit perfectly! everything about the case feels durable and lasting which is important because the ear buds are as amazing as advertised and I want them to last despite our clumsy ways! In all seriousness, I am truly impressed.

      Top reviews from the United States

      • Lev Kronovitch
        5 out of 5 stars
        Great earbuds nice price
        Reviewed in the United States on May 4, 2026
        Color: SilverStyle: Buds 3 ProPattern: Buds 3 Pro Only
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        I am highly satisfied with these earbuds, having utilized them for nearly a year. Their features are commendable, particularly the intuitive volume control via sliding gestures and the convenient voice command functionality. I frequently find myself attempting voice commands with other earbuds, only to realize I am not using the Galaxy Buds. While the bass response initially required adjustment, the equalizer settings effectively enhanced the audio quality. The noise cancellation is exceptional, and the responsive yet not overly sensitive controls contribute to a positive user experience. The build quality is robust, having withstood numerous drops without issue. The compact design facilitates portability, and the rapid charging capability is highly advantageous. Furthermore, the ambient aware feature effectively boosts bass, which I find beneficial. These earbuds demonstrate broad compatibility across Samsung and Apple devices.

      • Valentine
        5 out of 5 stars
        perfect perfect perfect!!
        Reviewed in the United States on March 24, 2026
        Color: SilverStyle: Buds 3 ProPattern: Buds 3 Pro Only
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        This is the first time I can justify buying earbuds with a high price.

        As someone who’s constantly listening to music, I haven’t had them die on me. Id say the longest the case went without needing a charge was around 3-4 days?

        Of course depending on how much you use them this would vary just like any other device!

        But even without fully charging it doing a quick charge can go a long way.

        If you have a Samsung device the customization on these are incredible and very easy to navigate through, want more bass? You can do that! Want to have a more clear and higher quality audio? You can also have that!

        Noise cancellation and ambient modes, all of it easy to access together.

        And the volume on it is LOUD . Even if it’s half way which is great

        Calling on it sounds clear not muffled unlike other headphones.

        Also the case holds up well. My boyfriend’s dropped twice and although it’s scuffed they work just fine. Buuut I do highly recommend finding a protective case for it.

        Another thing to add is that it comes with extra buds to of course, cater to different ear size. my ears are very small and it’s super comfortable to wear without them falling out.

        There’s many other features I’ve yet to look at as well but trust me if you buy them you won’t be disappointed!!

        Read moreRead less

      • Michael W. Jacobson
        5 out of 5 stars
        These are my best buds! (Get it?)
        Reviewed in the United States on November 4, 2025
        Color: SilverStyle: Buds 3 ProPattern: Buds 3 Pro Only
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        Wow, wow, WOW. My only regret in not purchasing the Buds 3 Pro for my Galaxy phone and tablet is that I didn't do it sooner.

        I've used a few different types of buds, from Echo Buds to highly rated Sony ones, and the Galaxy Buds really deliver for me the best of all worlds.

        First, sound. Wow! Most buds you can hear, and...that's about it. My Sony ones were terrific. But these offer perfect clarity, good bass response, and a real openness to the music (I'm a vinyl record fanatic, so I tend to grimace at the sound of streaming music through tiny buds...not here). Plus the amazing flexibility in sound control...you have many preset EQ setting to choose from, or you can do it manually to tweak how you like. There are even settings optimized for your age range, and an ability to go through a test of sounds for it to set up an optimal listening experience based on your results. I always test buds with "Get Lucky" by Daft Punk, and I was very impressed. Clear bass and midrange, and even a sense of space in the music!

        These also offer the best active noise cancelling I've yet heard with ear buds. None have been "dead silence" all around, but even leaving my house and standing under a noisy garage door opener, seemed only a few of the high frequencies barely skipped through. You can also opt for ambient sound, or an automatic switch, so they'll go from ANC to ambient if a siren approaches or someone speaks to you.

        Ear bud fit is always something that gives me "fits", and these come with other tips you can switch out for best sizing, but right out of the case, they were comfortable and felt like nothing was there. So much so I worried they might be too loose, but several vigorous head shakes later and they were secure, so I had both a sense of confidence in fit, as well as a little dizziness from head shaking.

        You can control the buds by the stems if you wish, and controls are customizable. A squeeze can answer a call or skip a song, and a simple slide with your finger up or down can control the volume.

        The case charges wirelessly or with USB. Like most bud cases, the center of gravity is too high so they tend to tip over when the lid is open. It seems to charge fast. I'm not much of an expert on battery life, but I know my Sony ones lost a lot of power quickly. I took a 20 minute walk with the Galaxy Buds fully charged, volume at a good clip, and music constantly playing, and when I got done, they were at 91%.

        I mainly decided to try these because the battery life in my Sony buds was getting a little troubling. I'm glad I did. I can't speak to how these will work for you if you don't have a Samsung ecosystem, but for me, the incredible sound, comfort, and ease of use and customization really make the Galaxy Buds stand out!

        Read moreRead less
        43 people found this helpful

      • Alexander Karpetsky
        5 out of 5 stars
        Sound quality is much better than airpods pro
        Reviewed in the United States on January 28, 2026
        Color: WhiteStyle: Buds 3 ProPattern: Buds 3 Pro Only
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        I’ve been using the Samsung Galaxy Buds 3 Pro for some time now, and overall I’m very impressed with the experience.

        First of all, the sound quality is outstanding. The audio is clear, well-balanced, and powerful, with deep bass that doesn’t overpower the mids and highs. Music sounds rich and detailed, and the spatial audio effect really adds depth, especially when watching movies or videos.

        The active noise cancellation (ANC) works extremely well. It noticeably reduces background noise like traffic, wind, or conversations, making them perfect for travel, flights, and busy environments. At the same time, the ambient and voice modes are very natural — you can clearly hear people around you without removing the earbuds.

        Comfort is another strong point. The earbuds feel light and secure, even during long listening sessions or workouts. They stay in place well and don’t cause ear fatigue, which is something I really appreciate.

        The integration with Samsung devices is excellent. Seamless switching between devices, fast pairing, and smart AI features make everyday use very convenient. Call quality is also impressive — voices sound clean and clear even in noisy surroundings.

        Battery life is solid and more than enough for daily use, and the charging case is compact and premium-feeling.

        Overall, the Galaxy Buds 3 Pro are a top-tier choice for anyone looking for premium wireless earbuds with great sound, strong noise cancellation, smart features, and reliable comfort. Highly recommended, especially for Samsung users.

        Read moreRead less
        Alexander Karpetsky
        5 out of 5 stars
        Sound quality is much better than airpods pro
        Reviewed in the United States on January 28, 2026
        Color: WhiteStyle: Buds 3 ProPattern: Buds 3 Pro Only
        Verified Purchase

        I’ve been using the Samsung Galaxy Buds 3 Pro for some time now, and overall I’m very impressed with the experience.

        First of all, the sound quality is outstanding. The audio is clear, well-balanced, and powerful, with deep bass that doesn’t overpower the mids and highs. Music sounds rich and detailed, and the spatial audio effect really adds depth, especially when watching movies or videos.

        The active noise cancellation (ANC) works extremely well. It noticeably reduces background noise like traffic, wind, or conversations, making them perfect for travel, flights, and busy environments. At the same time, the ambient and voice modes are very natural — you can clearly hear people around you without removing the earbuds.

        Comfort is another strong point. The earbuds feel light and secure, even during long listening sessions or workouts. They stay in place well and don’t cause ear fatigue, which is something I really appreciate.

        The integration with Samsung devices is excellent. Seamless switching between devices, fast pairing, and smart AI features make everyday use very convenient. Call quality is also impressive — voices sound clean and clear even in noisy surroundings.

        Battery life is solid and more than enough for daily use, and the charging case is compact and premium-feeling.

        Overall, the Galaxy Buds 3 Pro are a top-tier choice for anyone looking for premium wireless earbuds with great sound, strong noise cancellation, smart features, and reliable comfort. Highly recommended, especially for Samsung users.

      • Kirik
        1 out of 5 stars
        Worst fit and worst ergonomics ever
        Reviewed in the United States on October 12, 2025
        Color: SilverStyle: Buds 3 ProPattern: Buds 3 Pro Only
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        I've read countless comments about the bad fit of these earbuds and hesitated for 6 months to buy them until they went on sale and I decided to buy.

        First thing I noticed right out the box is how slippery the case and the buds 3 pro are. The case won't sit straight when opened (look at picture). Even when the case is closed, the case still doesn't sit straight up because the bottom isn't completely flat (see picture showing the bottom).

        Even the ear tip covers are slippery compared to my galaxy buds+ and buds FE.

        The first time I put them in my ears, the fit was OK. I stood up, shook my head, jumped around, did a little run and they didn't fall. Then I sat and tried all the AI cool features that I already had on my Sony wh1000xm4 for 5 years. The sound is OK, noise cancelation OK, phone call is better than my buds+ and buds fe(weird thing is any galaxy buds that I bought always had excellent phone call in the beginning until a newer version comes out and it won't work as it used to be as if the software is made to become worse and push us to buy the newest release).

        After 30 minutes of testing, I was about to write a 5 star review on Amazon and that's when both earbuds fell of at the same time from my ears. I couldn't believe it. I picked up both of them, wiped them of and cleaned my ears and put them again and sat for like 3 hours doing online browsing on my desktop computer and they didn't fall. Later that night, I went to lift weights as my late night training and the earbuds again fell when my ears started sweating. The next day, the left earbud fell and disappeared while I was lifting weights and it took me 30 minutes to find it because there's a 6 digits PIN that is automatically setup without us knowing and to locate the lost earbud, you need to reset that pin before turning it off. After that, I found that the latest version of Galaxy wearable app is different than all the YouTube videos showing how to find these earbuds when lost. You can't find them if they are in the case closed. You can't find them if they aren't connected to your bluetooth. You can only use the latest location in those cases and that works only if you have the latest Samsung phones with the latest android update.

        Today(Oct 11th 2025 night), the left earbud again fell and was lost in the middle of a busy highway when I was crossing it. Not only it took a lot of time to open the app, enter wearable app, go to find my earbud, click on ring, it also had a VERY LOW RING and I couldn't hear it (the buds 3 pro has the lowest ring volume followed by the buds+ and then come the buds fe with the loudest ring sound twice louder than the buds 3 pro lost ring sound level). I was lucky my Garmin Fenix 8 had a flashlight which I used to find it before the red light becomes green.

        I ordered some ear hooks for $25 to hold the earbuds on my ears and hope they'll work fine once I receive them.

        I will never recommend these earbuds unless you buy a ear hook to keep them secure because they'll fall and will be lost before the return window to return them, if you plan to return them.

        Update(01/09/2026): I lost my earbuds in the middle of nowhere(actually somewhere in the countryside of GA) without internet data and I opened the SmartThings app to search for them but the app blocked me and won't work unless I update the app.

        How can we be forced to update an app in an emergency situation where we need the app but can't update the app?

        This is the last time that I buy Samsung earbuds and I'm not even allowed to search for my lost earbuds because my phone doesn't have internet. That's not acceptable!

        Read moreRead less
        Kirik
        1 out of 5 stars
        Worst fit and worst ergonomics ever
        Reviewed in the United States on October 12, 2025
        Color: SilverStyle: Buds 3 ProPattern: Buds 3 Pro Only
        Verified Purchase

        I've read countless comments about the bad fit of these earbuds and hesitated for 6 months to buy them until they went on sale and I decided to buy.

        First thing I noticed right out the box is how slippery the case and the buds 3 pro are. The case won't sit straight when opened (look at picture). Even when the case is closed, the case still doesn't sit straight up because the bottom isn't completely flat (see picture showing the bottom).

        Even the ear tip covers are slippery compared to my galaxy buds+ and buds FE.

        The first time I put them in my ears, the fit was OK. I stood up, shook my head, jumped around, did a little run and they didn't fall. Then I sat and tried all the AI cool features that I already had on my Sony wh1000xm4 for 5 years. The sound is OK, noise cancelation OK, phone call is better than my buds+ and buds fe(weird thing is any galaxy buds that I bought always had excellent phone call in the beginning until a newer version comes out and it won't work as it used to be as if the software is made to become worse and push us to buy the newest release).

        After 30 minutes of testing, I was about to write a 5 star review on Amazon and that's when both earbuds fell of at the same time from my ears. I couldn't believe it. I picked up both of them, wiped them of and cleaned my ears and put them again and sat for like 3 hours doing online browsing on my desktop computer and they didn't fall. Later that night, I went to lift weights as my late night training and the earbuds again fell when my ears started sweating. The next day, the left earbud fell and disappeared while I was lifting weights and it took me 30 minutes to find it because there's a 6 digits PIN that is automatically setup without us knowing and to locate the lost earbud, you need to reset that pin before turning it off. After that, I found that the latest version of Galaxy wearable app is different than all the YouTube videos showing how to find these earbuds when lost. You can't find them if they are in the case closed. You can't find them if they aren't connected to your bluetooth. You can only use the latest location in those cases and that works only if you have the latest Samsung phones with the latest android update.

        Today(Oct 11th 2025 night), the left earbud again fell and was lost in the middle of a busy highway when I was crossing it. Not only it took a lot of time to open the app, enter wearable app, go to find my earbud, click on ring, it also had a VERY LOW RING and I couldn't hear it (the buds 3 pro has the lowest ring volume followed by the buds+ and then come the buds fe with the loudest ring sound twice louder than the buds 3 pro lost ring sound level). I was lucky my Garmin Fenix 8 had a flashlight which I used to find it before the red light becomes green.

        I ordered some ear hooks for $25 to hold the earbuds on my ears and hope they'll work fine once I receive them.

        I will never recommend these earbuds unless you buy a ear hook to keep them secure because they'll fall and will be lost before the return window to return them, if you plan to return them.

        Update(01/09/2026): I lost my earbuds in the middle of nowhere(actually somewhere in the countryside of GA) without internet data and I opened the SmartThings app to search for them but the app blocked me and won't work unless I update the app.

        How can we be forced to update an app in an emergency situation where we need the app but can't update the app?

        This is the last time that I buy Samsung earbuds and I'm not even allowed to search for my lost earbuds because my phone doesn't have internet. That's not acceptable!

        100 people found this helpful
        Helpful
        Sending feedback...

        Sorry, we failed to record your vote. Please try again
        Report
        Sending feedback...
        Thanks, we'll investigate in the next few days.
        Sorry, We failed to report this review. Please try again
      • ken
        4 out of 5 stars
        Pretty good earbuds (Update)
        Reviewed in the United States on September 22, 2024
        Color: SilverStyle: Buds 3 ProPattern: Buds 3 Pro Only
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        I received my earbuds on Sept 1 after the unfortunate delay on pre-order. Am writing this review on sept 21 since first using these earbuds. Am glad I still waited on these because for the price am pretty satisfied with the sound clarity and comfort. Real quick to setup and connect to my s23 plus.

        Personally I don't like using the noise canceling feature on headphones or earbuds, mainly because I find it to cause fatigue on my ears within about 30mins of use. However the noise canceling is pretty good. Not as good as the sony wf1000 mx4 I used to have, but pretty good to say the least. I find myself using more the ambient sound to hear others around me while listening to music. But if am just want to tune out I just have it set to off all together. In fact when I go out for walks I just have it off without noise canceling/ ambient. Just having the sound up can block outside great as is.

        In comparison, I had my sony wf1000 mx4. Personally, I though those earbuds were great on sound quality but not so much on comfort. Those that know, the sony mx4 earbuds used memory foam ear tips that expand on your ears and can cause fatigue as soon as you start using them. Had to use the small earbuds size to feel better on my ears. But it was unpleasant. The sound quality and good bass was my favorite thing about the sony mx4 earbuds but they stop charging some time last year. And been using my back up razer chroma earbuds waiting to see what samsung will put out on the buds 3. Am pretty glad I did.

        My first impression on the galaxy 3 pros is the sound clarity, comfort fit, and the light weight they rest on my ears. The audio quality is great but I did prefer the sony better and bass. Battery life is great but of course is better if you leave the light bar on the sides off, but a pretty cool feature.

        I will say I do recommend playing with the eq settings. I personally did find the default eq a bit dull. I'm happy to share my eq settings but I don't think you need to make any big changes to make the earbuds sound a bit more vivid it needs to be. Everyone has their own taste when it comes to eq adjustments. But like I said before i don't think is something to make big changes to. I like to listen a bit of everything, classical, rock, metal, classic rock, rap, kpop/ jpop, country, phonk, jazz, Latin.

        Nevertheless, I hope this review helps

        Ps. If you plan to get these earbuds for a apple device, I don't recommend it because of codec support. I recommend researching more on your own if you don't know the difference with apple use of aac codec and android device LDAC/aptx codec. Basically apple devices don't support the same high res audio on Android devices.

        Update 10/28

        So there was an update that came out for these earbuds improving sound quality. I notice a bit more bass and richer sound. However, something I forgot to mention on my last post was to be sure to go on the wear app and turn on UHQ (ultra high-quality audio). select sound quality and effects, advance quality options, and turn on UHQ audio. Again I should let you know this may not be available for you if you use apple device because what I mention before that apple devices don't use LDAC or Aptx codec. So is honestly better if you stick to apple ecosystem earbuds. Android phone users and samsung devices should support the UHQ option.

        One more of advice, if you use Spotify go to settings (click on your profile), and then Media Quality. From there you have options to set audio stream quality to auto, low, normal, high, and very high. And change between audio stream quality using wifi and cellular stream. I have mine set wifi stream on very high and cellular stream on high. Now you can take full advantage on these earbuds and maybe other headphones you like to use.

        Read moreRead less
        ken
        4 out of 5 stars
        Pretty good earbuds (Update)
        Reviewed in the United States on September 22, 2024
        Color: SilverStyle: Buds 3 ProPattern: Buds 3 Pro Only
        Verified Purchase

        I received my earbuds on Sept 1 after the unfortunate delay on pre-order. Am writing this review on sept 21 since first using these earbuds. Am glad I still waited on these because for the price am pretty satisfied with the sound clarity and comfort. Real quick to setup and connect to my s23 plus.

        Personally I don't like using the noise canceling feature on headphones or earbuds, mainly because I find it to cause fatigue on my ears within about 30mins of use. However the noise canceling is pretty good. Not as good as the sony wf1000 mx4 I used to have, but pretty good to say the least. I find myself using more the ambient sound to hear others around me while listening to music. But if am just want to tune out I just have it set to off all together. In fact when I go out for walks I just have it off without noise canceling/ ambient. Just having the sound up can block outside great as is.

        In comparison, I had my sony wf1000 mx4. Personally, I though those earbuds were great on sound quality but not so much on comfort. Those that know, the sony mx4 earbuds used memory foam ear tips that expand on your ears and can cause fatigue as soon as you start using them. Had to use the small earbuds size to feel better on my ears. But it was unpleasant. The sound quality and good bass was my favorite thing about the sony mx4 earbuds but they stop charging some time last year. And been using my back up razer chroma earbuds waiting to see what samsung will put out on the buds 3. Am pretty glad I did.

        My first impression on the galaxy 3 pros is the sound clarity, comfort fit, and the light weight they rest on my ears. The audio quality is great but I did prefer the sony better and bass. Battery life is great but of course is better if you leave the light bar on the sides off, but a pretty cool feature.

        I will say I do recommend playing with the eq settings. I personally did find the default eq a bit dull. I'm happy to share my eq settings but I don't think you need to make any big changes to make the earbuds sound a bit more vivid it needs to be. Everyone has their own taste when it comes to eq adjustments. But like I said before i don't think is something to make big changes to. I like to listen a bit of everything, classical, rock, metal, classic rock, rap, kpop/ jpop, country, phonk, jazz, Latin.

        Nevertheless, I hope this review helps

        Ps. If you plan to get these earbuds for a apple device, I don't recommend it because of codec support. I recommend researching more on your own if you don't know the difference with apple use of aac codec and android device LDAC/aptx codec. Basically apple devices don't support the same high res audio on Android devices.

        Update 10/28

        So there was an update that came out for these earbuds improving sound quality. I notice a bit more bass and richer sound. However, something I forgot to mention on my last post was to be sure to go on the wear app and turn on UHQ (ultra high-quality audio). select sound quality and effects, advance quality options, and turn on UHQ audio. Again I should let you know this may not be available for you if you use apple device because what I mention before that apple devices don't use LDAC or Aptx codec. So is honestly better if you stick to apple ecosystem earbuds. Android phone users and samsung devices should support the UHQ option.

        One more of advice, if you use Spotify go to settings (click on your profile), and then Media Quality. From there you have options to set audio stream quality to auto, low, normal, high, and very high. And change between audio stream quality using wifi and cellular stream. I have mine set wifi stream on very high and cellular stream on high. Now you can take full advantage on these earbuds and maybe other headphones you like to use.

      • Nancy & Steve I.
        5 out of 5 stars
        Best fit for anyone who has mild to moderate hearing loss
        Reviewed in the United States on August 17, 2025
        Color: SilverStyle: Buds 3 ProPattern: Buds 3 Pro Only
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        Hear is the thing (get that play on words), one of the greatest features that the Buds 3 Pro offer is the “Adaptive Ambient Sound”. If you wear hearing aids or just have hearing issues the Galaxy Buds 3 Pro downloadable program “Galaxy Wearable” offers a test that you do to base the final sounds produced that are fine tuned for your hearing deficiencies.

        In addition, they offer a further adjustment as the program offers an additional sound volume adjustment to help with background sounds as a function that lets you adjust for high and extra high volume in the background sounds, which makes it easier to hear for people with mild to moderate hearing loss. They also allow you to boast voices in front of you, while enjoying your favorite tones.

        At this point, I must say these are features you probably only enjoy if you have a Samsung Galaxy phone as I have not tried these on any other phone types. However, if you have a Galaxy phone, let me continue. I have tried the Buds FE, the Buds 2 Pro, and now the Buds 3 Pro. My wife tried the Buds 2 Pro and now has the Buds FE, which fit her ears the best. I love the fit of the Bubs 3 Pro *, and since I have hearing issues the more expensive advanced speaker system is a must for me.

        So, we are finally at a point to discuss the sound quality of these Buds. As I stated, I’ve tried all three, and they all sound pretty impressive. When I was younger, I owned all McIntosh tube equipment and used an ESS Heil bi-amplification speaker system which due to the volume I listened at probably now account for some my hearing deficiencies today. With that said, I am amazed with the quality I now can achieve with the Bubs 3 Pro.

        On the other hand, my wife is so pleased with the Galaxy Buds FE. I have tried many different price levels ear buds, and it depends on your personal taste and standards of excellence. I again want to state how pleased I am with the “Galaxy Wearable” program for the use with most of the Samsung's buds.

        To round this out, I would like to state that I find the quality of the Samsung Galaxy Ear Buds 3 Pro coupled with there software to be the best fit for anyone who has mild to moderate hearing loss. It my guess that anyone could benefit with these personal adjustments.

        * I am updating this review with the following suggestions: I did find that on occasion one of the Buds 3 Pro would slip out. I changed over to “Comply” TRUEGRIP Max foam tips and added “Gcioii” Ear Hooks Anti-Slip Covers. Both items are available for purchase via Amazon. Besides the Buds now being snug as a bug, I was surprised at the improvement in the sound quality the TRUEGRIP Max foam tips made. The downside to the ear hooks, is they have to be removed when putting in the charger case. However, they do fit in the top portion of the case for transportation. Also I choose the Gcioii Ear hooks over several other less expensive ear hooks available for the Buds 3 Pro because they show on the outside marking for right and left on the Buds.

        In addition, I purchased SURITCH Magnetic Bumper Rugged Shockproof Protective Cover with Carabiner & Cleaning Kit & Removal Tool (again, available here on Amazon). It helped, as the original charging case suppled is very slippery and can easily get damaged when dropped. Two items of note with this accessory case, the Carabiner is a great accessory, especially for those of us who already have carry a case to put our hearing aids in when using the Ear Buds. In addition, my wireless charger still worked even with the protective cover on the charger case.

        Read moreRead less

      Product Summary: Samsung Galaxy Buds 3 Pro AI True Wireless Bluetooth Earbuds, Noise Cancelling, Sound Optimization, Redesigned Comfort Fit, White [US Version, Amazon Exclusive, 2Yr Warranty]

      From Samsung

      4.2 out of 5 stars, 6,239 ratings

      Customer reviews

      200+ bought in past month

      Price

      One-time purchase: $231.53 7% Savings

      List Price: $249.99

      Purchasing options

      Other sellers

      Other sellers

      About this Item

      • REDESIGNED WITH THE BEST SOUND IN MIND: Keep your Galaxy Buds3 Pro in with a design that delivers long-lasting comfort for an immersive listening experience
      • A SLEEK DESIGN MADE TO SHINE: Let your sound shine as much as you do with Buds3 Pro that light up¹
      • AUDIO THAT ADAPTS TO YOUR SURROUNDINGS: Immerse yourself while staying alert to your surroundings thanks to Adaptive Active Noise Cancellation with Galaxy AI²; Your Buds will automatically adapt to help you hear what matters²
      • AUDIO TAILORED TO BEST FIT YOU: Immerse yourself in the best listening experience, no matter how you wear your Galaxy Buds3 Pro; An Adaptive Equalizer for Sound Optimization with Galaxy AI allows you to get the most out of your audio²
      • EXCLUSIVE 2-YEAR WARRANTY: Includes a 2-year limited Samsung warranty (Amazon exclusive)⁵
      • SOUND THAT TRANSPORTS YOU: Your favorite content deserves our best and most immersive audio¹
      • THEY SAY “HOLA,” YOU HEAR “HELLO: Hear translations through your Galaxy Buds during face-to-face conversations using Real-Time Interpreter with Galaxy AI³
      • YOUR BEST BUDS FOR TRANSLATING CALLS: Hear translations through your Galaxy Buds while using the Samsung Phone app³
      • TOUCH CONTROLS WITH A PERSONAL TOUCH: Program your Galaxy Buds controls to do what you want — pause, skip, accept calls and more — with Intuitive Touch Control¹
      • DESIGNED FOR DURABILITY: Listen to your Galaxy Buds3 Pro with peace of mind wherever the day takes you thanks to a durable design⁴

      Product Description

      Meet the new shape of sound — Galaxy Buds3 Pro — now completely redesigned with improved hardware to bring you deeper into the audio than ever before. With Galaxy AI¹, your Buds create the best listening experience by optimizing sound based on your surroundings and how you wear them — while providing a snug fit for all-day comfort, no matter what you do. Buds3 Pro get how much you love your audio. From jamming while cooking to listening to your favorite show on a crowded subway to taking a work call, your Buds will adjust to the different sounds around you using Adaptive Active Noise Cancellation so you always hear what’s important. Plus, they’re packed with features to create a convenient listening experience — from auto-switching⁴ your audio between your Galaxy phone and your Galaxy PC to immersing you in the latest TV shows with 360 Audio, now available on Samsung TVs. And it doesn’t stop there — Buds make perfect companions for your Galaxy phone as you travel. Real-Time Interpreter with Galaxy AI³ allows you to speak like a local as your phone translates speech right in your Buds so you never miss a word from your local tour guide. No matter what you listen to or how you listen, we’ve redesigned our Buds to give you the most immersive audio experience with Galaxy Buds3 Pro. ¹Requires a compatible Galaxy phone and One UI 4.0 or later with 1.5GB RAM or above. ²Requires initial set up via Samsung Wear app on compatible device. ³Requires compatible Galaxy device. Samsung account login and language preset (English and Spanish pre-installed; other languages require free download). Results may vary. ⁴IP-rated for submersion in up to 3 feet of fresh water for up to 30 minutes (charging case is not water-resistant). If the earbuds or your hands are wet, they must be dried thoroughly prior to handling. ⁵Available only on products sold by and shipped from Amazon.

      Newer Version Available

      Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro (2026) AI True Wireless Bluetooth Earbuds, Hi-Res Audio, 2-Way Speaker, ANC 2.0, Optimized Comfort, IP57, Live Translation, White [US Version, 2 Yr Warranty]

      $249.99 , 4.6 out of 5 stars, 1,064 ratings

      In Stock

      • Gray
      • Silver
      • White

      • Buds 3 Pro
